text:
We’re Hiring | Senior IR Professional 

JSW Steel is looking for an experienced Industrial… more
content_desc:
We’re Hiring | Senior IR Professional 

JSW Steel is looking for an experienced Industrial Relations leader to drive positive employee relations, collective bargaining, compliance, and stakeholder management.

🎓 Qualification: Master’s in PMIR / IR / LLIR from premier institutes
💼 Experience: 20–25 years in IR with leadership exposure

If you are passionate about building harmonious workplaces in a dynamic manufacturing environment, we’d love to connect with you.

📩 Scan the QR code in the poster to apply.

 Priya Ranjan Kumar

#JSWSteel #Hiring #IndustrialRelations #LeadershipHiring #HRJobs #Manufacturing #CareerOpportunity
